applicationNote: Apply through the myNSFAS portal at www.nsfas.org.za before the national closing date.

additionalFunding.name: UP Top Achiever Bursary
additionalFunding.criteria: Top 5 learners per province in matric NSC

additionalFunding.name: UP Vice-Chancellor's Bursary
additionalFunding.criteria: APS 40+ and 90%+ aggregate; exceptional leadership record

additionalFunding.name: UP Merit Bursary
additionalFunding.criteria: APS 34+ and strong subject performance in relevant field

additionalFunding.name: UP Sport Bursary
additionalFunding.criteria: National or Tuks varsity sport representation

additionalFunding.name: UP Disability Bursary
additionalFunding.criteria: Students with documented disabilities; financial need assessment
